inputs.label: Beam Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the beam between supports in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the beam between supports in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Destekler arasındaki kiriş uzunluğu, metre cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge des Trägers zwischen den Stützen in Metern.

inputs.label: Cross-Section Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the beam rectangular cross-section in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the beam rectangular cross-section in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dikdörtgen kiriş kesitinin genişliği, metre cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite des rechteckigen Querschnitts des Trägers in Metern.

inputs.label: Cross-Section Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the beam rectangular cross-section in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of the beam rectangular cross-section in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dikdörtgen kiriş kesitinin yüksekliği, metre cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe des rechteckigen Querschnitts des Trägers in Metern.

inputs.label: Distributed Load
inputs.businessContext: Uniformly distributed load applied along the beam length in Newtons per meter.

businessContext_i18n.en: Uniformly distributed load applied along the beam length in Newtons per meter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kiriş boyunca düzgün yayılı yük, Newton/metre cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gleichmäßig verteilte Last entlang der Trägerlänge in Newton pro Meter.

breakdown.label: Maximum Bending Moment
breakdown.description: Maximum bending moment at midspan in Newton-meters.

breakdown.label: Section Modulus
breakdown.description: Elastic section modulus of the rectangular cross-section in cubic meters.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
